untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detecting 'trend shift confirmation' and 'prior opposite direction confirmed' which cannot be expressed with single-bar indicator comparisons. The rule needs multi-bar trend directionality assessment (e.g., ADX or slope analysis over lookback period) not available in allowed operators. Entry condition '5-period moving average in direction of trend' is ambiguous without explicit trend state detection. No allowed indicator can directly confirm trend direction reversal without custom logic.
translation_notes: Attempted to translate using sma_5 crosses as proxy for trend confirmation per entry conditions, but the core requirement of confirming prior trend reversal (using 3-bar lookback) cannot be properly expressed. ADX_14 could help if slope/trend strength operators were available. Consider adding trend detection indicators or multi-bar comparison operators for full implementation.
